scripts.dev: pnpm --filter react-zmage run build && vite dev
scripts.dev:r17: cross-env REACT_VERSION=17 pnpm --filter react-zmage run build && cross-env REACT_VERSION=17 vite dev
scripts.dev:r18: cross-env REACT_VERSION=18 pnpm --filter react-zmage run build && cross-env REACT_VERSION=18 vite dev
scripts.dev:r19: cross-env REACT_VERSION=19 pnpm --filter react-zmage run build && cross-env REACT_VERSION=19 vite dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter react-zmage run build && rimraf ../../docs && vite build
